allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\vitmo.WINDOWS11PRO\\OneDrive - hapucomplex\\Claude\\01-CMMS\\RUN_NOW.txt" -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host "Lines: $\($content.Count\)"; $content | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "[$_]" })

PowerShell(gh issue list --repo trucdienhapulico-ai/cmms-webapp --state all --limit 10 --json number,title,state | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "#$\($_.number\) [$\($_.state\)] $\($_.title\)" })

PowerShell(gh issue list --repo trucdienhapulico-ai/cmms-webapp --state all --json number,title,state | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "#$\($_.number\) [$\($_.state\)] $\($_.title\)" })

PowerShell(gh issue list --repo trucdienhapulico-ai/cmms-webapp --state open --json number,title,body | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "#$\($_.number\) $\($_.title\)"; Write-Host $_.body; Write-Host "---" })

PowerShell(gh issue list --repo trucdienhapulico-ai/cmms-webapp --state all --json number,title,state,labels,createdAt | ConvertFrom-Json | Sort-Object -Property number -Descending | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "#$\($_.number\) [$\($_.state\)] $\(\($_.labels | ForEach-Object { $_.name }\) -join ','\) | $\($_.title\)" })
